sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 32:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 32:1
items.html: There is a record whose light will return to the Partzuf, and there is a record whose light will never again return to the Partzuf. For this reason, it is considered to be in the form of departure, meaning that the light that departed from it will not return to the Partzuf. (Item 59)
